title: US restricts access to Mythos and GPT-5.6 AI models to trusted organizations
summary: The US government forces OpenAI and Anthropic to control the distribution of their most advanced artificial intelligence systems.

title: Microsoft extends Windows 10 security updates until October 2027
summary: The company offers two additional years of free patches due to low Windows 11 adoption.

title: AMD relaunches Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition due to high demand, and resellers drive up prices
summary: The AM4 gaming processor is available again in some markets, but speculators sell it at double its original price.

title: Eustella emerges: the European artificial intelligence chatbot competing with ChatGPT and Claude
summary: The European Union presents a sovereign assistant with agentic features to reduce dependence on major US tech companies.

title: Steam Machines being resold at exorbitant prices while Valve fixes an HDMI 2.1 issue
summary: Valve's new console faces reseller speculation and promises support for 4K at 240 Hz after fixing the error.

title: Iberia offers free Starlink Wi-Fi with speeds of up to 500 Mbps on its flights
summary: The Spanish airline implements high-speed satellite internet on its fleet, starting with one aircraft.

title: Apple to accelerate AI-focused M7 chip and skip M6 Pro and Max, according to reports
summary: The company is reportedly preparing a generation of processors optimized for artificial intelligence for 2027, skipping intermediate versions.

title: IBM develops the first 0.7-nanometer chip, the smallest and most efficient in the world
summary: The new node offers 50% more performance and 70% more energy efficiency compared to the previous 2 nm process.

title: PlayStation removes 551 movies from users' libraries, reigniting the debate on digital ownership
summary: Sony's measure affects content already purchased and draws criticism for lack of compensation and reliance on digital services.

title: Anthropic reports that Alibaba cloned its Claude assistant using 25,000 fake accounts
summary: The AI security company describes the distillation attack as the largest on record and demands sanctions against the Chinese company.

title: Framework lowers prices of its 13 Pro laptop to compete with Apple's increases
summary: The modular laptop company adjusts its prices and improves the value for money of its devices.

title: Amazon Prime Day offers big discounts on tech: laptops, monitors, routers, and more
summary: The deals include savings on gaming PCs, headphones, hard drives, and accessories, highlighted by several outlets.

title: Manufacturers like Lenovo warn that the price increase of RAM and SSDs will continue until 2030
summary: The rising cost of components due to high demand for artificial intelligence impacts the entire tech industry.

title: The map of 100 lawsuits against AI and the NYT lawsuit against Microsoft mark the rise of litigation in the sector
summary: Legal disputes over copyright and unfair competition are multiplying, threatening the development of artificial intelligence.

title: Oracle shares suffer worst week since the dot-com bubble on doubts over AI investment
summary: The market shows skepticism about the high spending on artificial intelligence and the profitability of sector companies.

title: PlayStation sales hit their lowest level in May in 26 years after PS5 price increase
summary: Sony's console suffers a historic drop in monthly sales, partly due to the model's price increase.

title: One in three employers replace entry-level positions with AI, impacting Generation Z
summary: Tech and manufacturing sectors lead the automation of junior jobs, increasing youth unemployment.

title: TikTok moves toward becoming a super app with integrated commerce and finance services
summary: The Chinese social network expands beyond video, competing with WeChat in the all-in-one app market.

title: Wikipedia co-founder permanently banned from the platform after editorial conflicts
summary: Jimmy Wales cannot edit the encyclopedia he co-founded, sparking debate over site governance.

title: Tesla reaches out-of-court settlement in lawsuit over accident with its FSD system
summary: The electric car maker remains under federal investigation over the safety of its autonomous driving technology.
